---
title: "A Machine Learning Study of H&M Customer Behavior"
author: "Your Name"
date: today
format:

  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    toc-expand: 1
    toc-location: right-body
    toc-title: "Contents"
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: show
    code-tools: true
    theme: cosmo
    highlight-style: github
    df-print: paged
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  freeze: true
---

# **Data Set:** 

https://www.kaggle.com/competitions/h-and-m-personalized-fashion-recommendations/data
